title: School Supplies Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > School Supplies Donation Programs 8 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION HOME YOUTH SERVICES HOME YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day shelter with drop-in services and an overnight emergency shelter. Supports youth with meals, laundry, showers, personal items, and community connection. Accepts school supply donations. Programs include: Runaway and Homeless Youth Program (RHY): Connects youth and their families to resources that meet their immediate needs. Also provides mediation and counseling resources for family reunification. The goal is safe exits from the streets, achieved through relationships with local law enforcement, street outreach, and working closely with the school district and other community partners. Youth Empowerment Program (YEP): Offered in 4 elements including internships and jobs, financial literacy, workshops and field trips, and extended support. Youth cohorts go through the program in 3-month cycles and can earn high school credit for their work and experiences during the program. Taylor's House is a 10 bed emergency shelter thay offers services for study support, social activities, job training. Onsite treatment and counseling services, as well as meeting rooms for appointments, visits and recreation. 625 Union Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 11-17, 18 if still in school or working towards a GED Hours: The Drop In: Noon-7pm / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm Email (971) 273-7300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPERATION HOMEFRONT BACK TO SCHOOL BRIGADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides backpacks filled with school supplies. Donations accepted year-round. 17319 San Pedro Avenue Suite 505 San Antonio, TX 78232 Eligibility: Dependent children of: -Post 9/11 wounded, ill, or injured service member of any rank, both currently serving and those no longer serving in the military or -All ranks, Active Duty, Guard and Reserves, any duty status or -Transitioning service members within 12 months of their discharge or retirement date Hours: Varies by location; check website Email (210) 659-7756 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER IN HIS HANDS CLOTHING MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing depending on availability. Donations of clothing, backpacks, and school supplies accepted. 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 4pm-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 673-5918 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts basic school supplies such as pencils, paper, art supplies, binders, backpacks, or monetary donations. Offers an option to sponsor a child. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm (503) 585-6688 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts basic school supplies such as pencils, paper, art supplies, binders, backpacks, or monetary donations. Offers an option to sponsor a child. 1865 Bill Frey Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am--9pm Email (503) 798-4876 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works together with Family Partnership Advocates in schools to provide information and referral for services such as OHP, SNAP, WIC, housing support, furniture support, legal help, and basic needs assistance. 9550 SW Murdock Street Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-18 or pregnant individuals Hours: By appointment only (503) 603-1585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOME YOUTH SERVICES ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER IN HIS HANDS CLOTHING MINISTRY SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER
